concept.title: XSLT Customization Tutorial
concept.shortdesc: This tutorial teaches a practical, production-style way to customize HTML output from DITA using XSLT, primarily through DITA Open Toolkit DITA-OT 4.x plug-ins and official extension points.

ul.li: Sidebar TOC embedded in every topic page (nav-toc=full)
Chunking (map-driven split into multiple HTML pages)
Filtering and build variants using DITAVAL (examples for audience and platform)
Safe, upgrade-friendly XSLT override patterns that work across all topic types and common elements

conbody.note: Assumption: You publish with DITA-OT HTML5 (-f html5). If you use a CCMS, the same patterns apply; packaging and invocation may differ.

section.title: Analytics and Instrumentation
section.p: Track which customization steps are most challenging for users. Use analytics to improve the tutorial and add clarifications where needed.

section.title: Personalization and Conditional Processing
section.p: Show or hide advanced steps based on user role using DITA conditional processing.

section.title: Integrating with Conversational AI and NLP
section.p: Enable users to ask a chatbot for help with XSLT customization and receive step-by-step guidance from this tutorial.

section.title: Continuous Improvement and Feedback Loops
section.p: Collect feedback on tutorial clarity and pain points. Use analytics and user suggestions to refine the tutorial.
